basic_info.headline: Language models, multimodal models, generative AI, machine learning

experience.title: Research Engineer
experience.description:
I worked with the vision team to investigate new methods, build prototypes, run experiments and integrate vision components into training pipelines and robotic systems. Projects include:
- Scene understanding for robot manipulation: Prototyped and experimented on state-of-the-art deep neural networks from research papers for object localization, salient points detection, 6DoF pose estimation, stereo depth estimation to enable robot manipulation tasks.
tasks.
- Deploy and maintain production pipeline: Worked on the production pipeline for the vision models, including setting up the pipeline, generating training data, tuning model based on test results, etc.
- Active vision: Proposed and experimented an active vision scheme for object agnostic, learning-based parametric reconstruction; experimented with an on-arm camera motion strategies to improve vision task performance.
- Robotic integration: Integrated and tested vision algorithms on robots (running ROS), carried out grasping experiments.
- PGM as a backward pass for neural network: Contributed to a research project which applies probabilistic models with latent variables to model neural network activations.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description:
I worked on the search team over several projects, including:
- Duplicate question detection: Implemented and trained models to
detect paraphrased questions with 0.95 AUC. Built a service (Python Tornado)
that runs the classifier and serves production traffic.
- Quora Search: Proposed and implemented ranking improvements; improved
production speed of search functions and code quality.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description:
Software on optical measurement and inspection, including image processing, machine learning, database management, front-end and back-end service. Involved in the core projects of the company listed below:
► Hoteye Classifier: Implemented image-based feature extraction methods, clustering methods, and SVM modeling, resulting in improved classification performance and false label detection. Worked with customers, steel mill operators, to shape the classifier software to their needs.
► Optical Caliper: Extracted dimension information from images, designed and implemented algorithms which achieved 95-99% accuracy. Ported the software to Android platform, which enhanced the user experience of the product.
► Hoteye Web: Implemented a web-based interface to view the data output by the detection and classification system, allowing customers to view the data anywhere, on any platform.

experience.title: Graduate Student Instructor
experience.description: Teaching Introduction to Cryptography and Advanced Cryptography, with Professor Kevin Compton.

experience.title: Graduate Student Research Assistant
experience.description: Worked on research projects in Reinforcement Learning Lab: Designed algorithms, proved theorems, and conducted experiments exploring how multiple computational agents can operate through commitments in a highly dynamic environment.
